LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. INSTEAD, THE COURT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT THE STIPULATION TO CHANGE VENUE AND (PROPOSED) ORDER SUBMITTED BY PARTIES AT TODAY'S HEARING. PER THAT STIPULATION AND ORDER, THIS ACTION SHALL BE TRANSFERRED FROM THIS COURT TO THE ALAMEDA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT LOCATED AT 1221 OAK STREET, OAKLAND, CALIFORNIA 94612. THE PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH THE CHANGE IN VENUE AND THE PREVIOUSLY FILED MOTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY ALL/ANY FILING FEES OR COURT COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH THE TRANSFER, AND OTHERWISE COMPLY WITH THE TRANSFER REQUIREMENTS, INCLUDING THOSE SET FORTH IN C.C.P. SEC. 399. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. REBECCA M. COLL of Quadra & Coll, LLP, Tel No. (415) 426-3502, appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Bernard Doe;
Atty. COREY D. MCCARTHY of Halloway, Lucchese, Everson & Picchi APC, Tel No. (925) 930-9090 appearing for Defendant Kalpna Rachel Munzni, M.D.

At the request of parties, the Court vacated its tentative and ordered DEFENDANT KALPNA MUNZNI, M.D.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE off calendar. Instead, the Court signed in open court the Stipulation to Change Venue and (Proposed) Order submitted by parties at today's hearing. Per that stipulation and order, this action shall be transferred from this Court to the Alameda County Superior Court located at 1221 Oak Street, Oakland, California 94612. The parties shall bear their own fees and costs associated with the change in venue and the previously filed motion. Plaintiff shall pay all/any filing fees or court costs associated with the transfer, and otherwise comply with the transfer requirements, including those set forth in C.C.P. Sec. 399. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
